name: wf11 - 主数据查询(物料/仓库/库位)

parameters.query: SELECT 'items' AS _type, COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('c', item_code, 'n', COALESCE(item_name,''), 'u', COALESCE(uom,'')) ORDER BY item_code)::text, '[]') AS _json FROM wms.wms_items_cache WHERE company_code = $1 UNION ALL SELECT 'whs' AS _type, COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('c', whs_code, 'n', COALESCE(whs_name,'')) ORDER BY whs_code)::text, '[]') AS _json FROM wms.wms_locations_cache WHERE company_code = $1 UNION ALL SELECT 'bins' AS _type, COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('c', bin_code, 'w', COALESCE(whs_code,'')) ORDER BY whs_code, bin_code)::text, '[]') AS _json FROM wms.wms_bins_cache WHERE company_code = $1
